text:
The Sword of Good Omens (, Kitchōmaru) is a sword given to the new king of Kakin as a sign of accession. It is also one of the Kakin's regalia, along with the Seed Urn and the Lotus Anchorite. 

It is expected to have a use in the Succession Contest, but what that is has not been revealed yet.

Usage

The Sword of Good Omens has not been used in the story thus far.

Background

Not much is known about the background of the Sword of Good Omens.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

As people gather for 9 th Prince Halkenburg's funeral procession on the twelfth day of the voyage, Chrollo wanders around Tier 3 after unsuccessfully using Love Dial 6700 and concludes that the person he seeks is not on Tier 3. He debates moving up to Tier 1 because of his awareness that the succession contest is being held, with the expectation that there are far more people with abilities hiding there. Chrollo's mind wanders from his search for an ability and his thoughts turn toward the three sacred treasures he seeks—the Seed Urn, the Lotus Anchorite, and the Sword of Good Omens. 

As he walks through Tier 3, Chrollo tries to identify where the three sacred treasures were kept. He first assumes that Kakin's royal family has found out by then, through the mafia, that the Phantom Troupe were on board, and would never believe that they were on board just to search for Hisoka. Because the decision to keep the three sacred treasures together or separately is up to Kakin, and neither the mafia nor military reacted much as the Spiders searched from the bottom up, Chrollo concludes that they are much less likely to be in Tiers 3-5. Chrollo thinks of the importance of the three sacred treasures to the succession battle and for the maintenance of Kakin's prosperity, and guesses at the existence of a funeral hall focal point where the treasures are enshrined, which would only be on Tier 1. His thoughts wander back to Hisoka and Chrollo thinks about how stealing Kakin's holy treasures, more strictly guarded than King Nasubi himself, would satisfy the conditions required to upgrade Skill Hunter and grant him the power needed to kill Hisoka for good. 

Chrollo unsuccessfully uses Love Dial 6700 again in the crowd gathered for Halkenburg's funeral procession and confirms that what he seeks is upstairs.
